summary: Frontend testing completed for FuturoX AI multilingual chatbot and AI banners. English and Polish chatbot functionality verified working correctly. Spanish testing had UI interaction difficulties with the language dropdown selector - likely due to heavy animations/3D Spline component blocking clicks.

minor.issue: CORS error when fetching Solana price from frontend - blocked by browser

ui_bugs.issue: Language dropdown click timing out - likely due to Spline 3D animation or overlay blocking clicks. Tested multiple selector approaches - all timed out after 30s

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1, container sizing issue

english.greeting: Hello! I'm your FuturoX AI assistant 🤖 How can I help you today?

polish.greeting: Cześć! 👋 Zapytaj mnie o cokolwiek odnośnie FuturoX AI, tokena FTRX, lub naszych usług AI.

spanish.reason: Unable to interact with language dropdown due to click timeout issues - selectors resolved but clicks failed after 30s timeout

language_switcher.click_interaction: FAILS - timeout after 30s, element visible but click action does not complete

action_items: Investigate language switcher click issue - may need to add z-index or disable pointer-events on Spline component during interaction
Add data-testid attributes (already added to LanguageSwitcher component)
Fix Live Price Chart container sizing warning
critical_code_review_comments: ChatBot.jsx correctly tracks currentLang state and passes it to findAnswer(), getGreeting(), and getQuickReplies()
chatKnowledge.js has complete translations for EN, ES, PL with 10+ FAQ topics each
AIBanner.jsx exports 3 animated banner components with proper i18n translations
CORS issue with CoinGecko API should be proxied through backend or use alternative API
context_for_next_testing_agent: The language switcher dropdown opens but clicks timeout after 30s. This appears to be related to the Spline 3D animation component blocking interactions. Polish language switch was successfully tested earlier in the session using simpler selectors. The chatbot multilingual functionality is working correctly - greeting and quick replies change based on currentLang state.
rca_of_issue: The language dropdown click timeout is likely caused by the heavy Spline 3D animation component. The element is found and visible, but the click action never completes. This could be due to: 1) Animation event listeners intercepting clicks, 2) Overlay/z-index issues, 3) React state updates during click. Mitigation: Add pointer-events: none to Spline container during dropdown interaction, or increase dropdown z-index.
